title: Property Consultant - Supertech - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Supertech - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Supertech has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Howrah office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Supertech:
Supertech is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Property Valuation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Supertech!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
